rows.label: qev041313_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Gazing at this Rumedel,
I feel my Ovah elevating...
This is a truly magnificent card, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0002
rows.name:
I picked up a strange item in the park.
It is a golden card of a Nopohippo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have no attachment to it whatsoever.
However, if it were a Rumedel card,
I thought I would not mind displaying it in my room.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you desire this golden card,
please bring me a Rumedel card.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0007
rows.name:
How about it? This golden card and
the Rumedel card you possess...
Would you like to trade?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0008
rows.name:
My Ovah is elevating.
As expected, this Rumedel truly seems to be
the one that is appropriate for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Now, please take the golden
Nopohippo card with you.
There must be someone who needs it, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041313_MSG0010
rows.name:
Will you not reconsider it once more?
I need the Rumedel card...
And you should need this golden card.[ST:wait ]
